infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 19:00, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, McLaren Mastercard F1 Team Document 40 Date 05 June 2026 Time 18:45 No / Driver 1 - Land

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 19:00, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
McLaren Mastercard F1 Team
Document 40
Date 05 June 2026
Time 18:45
No / Driver 1 - Lando Norris
Reason Alleged breach of Article C9.3 of the FIA F1 Regulations
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes
